name: MITRE ATT&CK Coverage Dashboard
description: MITRE ATT&CK technique coverage based on detections across OCSF sources

panels.title: T1110 - Brute Force
panels.query: * | filter (message contains 'Failed password' OR resultType matches '^[1-9]') | group count() by coalesce(src_ip,src_endpoint_ip,callerIpAddress) | filter _count >= 3 | count()

panels.title: T1046 - Network Service Scanning
panels.query: * | filter action='deny' | group hits=count() by srcip, dstport | group ports=count() by srcip | filter ports >= 5 | group total=count()

panels.title: T1098 - Account Manipulation
panels.query: * | filter (message contains 'useradd' OR message contains 'usermod' OR message contains 'Add member to role' OR message contains 'GRANT') | count()

panels.title: T1021 - Remote Services
panels.query: * | filter dstport in (22,3389,5985,5986) | filter action='allow' | count()

panels.title: MITRE Tactics Coverage
panels.query: * | parse 'tactic_name' as tactic | filter tactic != null | group count() by tactic | sort -count
panels.description: Event distribution by MITRE ATT&CK tactic

panels.title: Kill Chain Progression by Source IP
panels.query: * | filter (src_ip != null OR src_endpoint_ip != null OR srcip != null) | let attacker_ip = coalesce(src_ip, src_endpoint_ip, srcip, callerIpAddress) | group hits=count() by attacker_ip, serverHost | group sources_touched=count(), total_events=sum(hits) by attacker_ip | filter sources_touched >= 2 | sort -sources_touched
panels.description: IPs that appear across multiple security sources (potential kill chain progression)
